summary: Single-round maker≠checker review by four fresh reviewers over the uncommitted slice diff (the maker did not review). Verdicts: code APPROVE_WITH_NITS, security PASS (clean), spec-compliance PASS (9/10 implemented, 1 partial reconciled), eval-judge 93/100 PASS. Three findings were folded with regression coverage: (CODE-1) a failed section read now renders an explicit «Не вдалося завантажити цей розділ» state instead of masquerading as empty/insufficient; (CODE-2) the four ledger reads now run via Promise.all (isolation preserved); (SPEC-1) the FR-DASH-03 spec delta was specialized to an expense/spend breakdown to match the design reference and implementation. Minor doc drift (tasks.md test paths) reconciled. Accepted with rationale: server-side logging of degraded reads (no shared logger; NFR-OBS-01 prefers a silent console; the per-section unavailable state already surfaces failure to the user) and the cosmetic rounded-percent-sum / partial-state retry-wording nits.

fixed.evidence: app/dashboard/page.tsx renders DASHBOARD.sectionUnavailable when categoryTotals/trends read failed (!ok), before the empty/insufficient branches, so a failed load is no longer shown as «Ще немає витрат…» / «Замало даних…». src/app-dashboard-page.states.test.ts asserts the unavailable copy appears and the misleading no-data copy does NOT, when both section reads fail.
app/dashboard/page.tsx awaits the four read() wrappers via Promise.all; each wrapper still catches its own error so per-section isolation is preserved.

openspec/changes/add-dashboard/specs/dashboard/spec.md FR-DASH-03 requirement reworded to an expense/spend breakdown (matching the design reference «Витрати за категоріями» and toExpenseBreakdown's t.totalMinor<0 filter), with an added 'Breakdown is spend-only' scenario and the «Без категорії when it has spend» clause. openspec validate --strict passes.
openspec/changes/add-dashboard/tasks.md 1.1/1.4 updated to the real test files (ledger-query.trends.test.ts, src/app-dashboard-page.{smoke,states}.test.ts).

acceptedOrDeferred.rationale: read() swallows the caught error with no server-side log. Accepted: no shared logging convention exists in src/modules/foundation, and NFR-OBS-01 wants a silent console on healthy sessions. The per-section unavailable state (CODE-1) and the PartialState banner already surface the failure to the user. Tracked as future observability work.

The partial banner says «спробуйте оновити сторінку» while the error state uses a «Спробувати ще раз» Link to /dashboard; both are the same GET re-fetch. Left as-is — accurate recovery guidance; not gating (eval-judge passed at 93).
Per-category Math.round percents may not sum to exactly 100 (cosmetic bar-width drift); the stacked bar uses overflow-hidden. Documented in design D5 as sums-tolerant.
